Job Opportunities

Applications for Academic Positions

Thank you for your interest and application to work at Kadir Has University.

Appointments of academic staff at our university are done within the scope of the announcements published in the Official Newspaper, in accordance with the relevant articles of the Law N. 2547

“Regulation for Promotion and Appointment to Faculty Members”, “Regulation on the Procedures and Principles Regarding the Central Exams and Entrance Exams to be Applied in the Assignments to be Made to the Staff of Faculty Other Than Faculty Members” and “Kadir Has University Regulations for Academic Staff Employment.”

Although it is not for an open or specific position, you can make a general application for open academic positions that may occur in the future at our University.

Click here for General Academic Staff Application Form

website. If there are no current postings suitable for your experience and expectations, you can send your CV to

[email protected]

to be considered for future positions.
